config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before the rights of the individual, because that can easily become an excuse for abuse by those in power. In my view, a good society protects individual rights first, then limits them only when there is a clear and necessary public reason. From my own perspective, people are often asked to sacrifice too much for "the common good" without enough protection from unfair treatment.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu itu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu dasar supaya negara tidak mudah menyalahgunakan kekuasaan atas nama “kebaikan bersama”. Tentu ada keadaan ketika kepentingan umum perlu dibatasi sementara, seperti soal keselamatan publik atau wabah, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, frasa “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan terhadap orang yang lemah atau tidak populer.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over individual rights in general, because in Indonesia that idea is too easy to misuse by officials, majorities, or social pressure. We have seen how appeals to the "common good" can silence dissent, excuse discrimination, or force ordinary people to bear the costs of decisions they did not make. That said, I do believe there are limited cases like public health, disaster response, or serious security threats where some individual rights can be restricted, but only if the limits are narrow, temporary, and accountable. A healthy society is not one where the individual is sacrificed first; it is one where the state is restrained enough that both society and the person can be protected.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu, karena dari pengalaman Amerika saya, itu terlalu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran bagi kekuasaan yang berlebihan. Poin tentang keadaan darurat memang penting: untuk wabah, keselamatan publik, atau bencana, pembatasan tertentu bisa sah, tetapi harus sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat. Yang saya tidak terima adalah logika bahwa “demi kebaikan bersama” hak orang bisa dikorbankan begitu saja, karena justru hak individu itulah yang melindungi minoritas dan orang yang tidak populer dari tekanan mayoritas. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang paling disiplin membatasi dirinya sendiri ketika memakai alasan kepentingan umum.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think the interests of society should take priority over individual rights in general, because in Indonesia that argument is too often used to pressure ordinary people into accepting unfair treatment. Public interest matters, but if individual rights are treated as secondary by default, then minorities, critics, and powerless people are the first to lose protection. The only time I accept limiting individual rights is when there is a clear, narrow, and accountable public necessity, such as a real health emergency or disaster response. Otherwise, saying “for society” can become a convenient excuse for abuse, and I do not trust that logic.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu, karena dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu harus tetap menjadi titik awal, bukan dikalahkan begitu saja oleh klaim “kepentingan masyarakat.” Saya paham argumen soal keadaan darurat, dan memang ada situasi seperti wabah atau ancaman keselamatan publik di mana pembatasan sementara bisa dibenarkan, tetapi harus sempit, transparan, dan diawasi ketat. Yang saya tidak terima adalah gagasan bahwa masyarakat selalu lebih penting, karena di praktiknya itu sering dipakai untuk membungkam minoritas, orang yang tidak populer, atau kritik terhadap pemerintah. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang kuat justru lahir dari pembatasan kekuasaan atas nama kebaikan bersama, bukan dari kebiasaan mengorbankan individu terlebih dahulu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
